Rooms.Name: The Forest Edge
Rooms.Description: Sunlight filters through a thick canopy of emerald leaves. A worn dirt path winds to the east.

Rooms.Name: Deep Whispering Woods
Rooms.Description: The shadows deepen here. The path stretches west back to safety, or north into total darkness.

Rooms.Name: A Hidden Grove
Rooms.Description: A peaceful clearing centered around a small, crystal-clear spring.
